recipients.label: Recipients
recipients.placeholder: Paste recipient account ids (1.2.x), one per line. Optionally add an amount: 1.2.1,10 or 1.2.1 10. JSON arrays are also supported: [{"account":"1.2.1","amount":10}]
recipients.preview: Previewing first {{shown}} of {{total}} recipients (click an id to view on a block explorer)

create.recipientsDescription: Provide the list of destination accounts. No network lookups are performed; accounts are referenced directly by their 1.2.x id.
create.customHint: Amounts are taken from the uploaded/pasted list. Recipients without an amount are skipped.
create.splitNote: This airdrop is split into {{batches}} transactions of up to {{perBatch}} recipients each.
create.connectAccount: Connect a sending account to continue.

list.title: Airdrops
list.emptyDescription: Create an airdrop to distribute an asset to many accounts at once.

perform.notFoundDescription: This airdrop plan could not be loaded. It may have been deleted.
perform.senderDescription: The connected account will pay for and sign each batch. Each batch is broadcast separately via your Beet wallet.
perform.connectRequired: Connect a sending account before broadcasting batches.
